creator: rudolphfroger@dreamsolution.nl
text:
Indeed, I tried setting GOTOOLCHAIN but I didn't succeed, probably one needs to do more. I'm not very familiar with the Go compiler, maybe someone else knows what to do exactly. Instead I wrote myself a patch to downgrade the `toolchain`, which worked fine.

See my issue here when I tried to locally upgrade the Forgejo port to version 10 https://codeberg.org/forgejo/forgejo/issues/6609
